name: ai-first-skills
description: Agent skills for AI-First product work: synthetic-user discovery, spec critique, exposure planning, and evidence-based product building. Companion toolkit for the Alaimo Labs AI-First Product Manager and AI-First Product Builder programs.

plugins.name: afpm
plugins.description: AI-First Product Manager skills: synthetic personas, persona interviews (exploration and validation), insight extraction, persona critique panels, and exposure plans.

plugins.name: afpb
plugins.description: AI-First Product Builder skills: falsifiable hypotheses, exposure plans, and the hypothesis-to-evidence experiment loop for prototypes built with coding agents.
